This market will resolve to "Over" if the Texas Longhorns and Gonzaga Bulldogs combine to score 150 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 150, this market will resolve to "Under".

eventMetadata.context_description: Gonzaga's elite offensive efficiency and depth anchor the 67.5% implied probability against Texas, reflecting trader consensus on the Bulldogs' recent dominance with seven straight wins, including blowouts over ranked foes. Texas struggles with guard rotation issues amid a three-game skid, hampered by sophomore point guard Chendall Williams' questionable ankle status from official injury reports, weakening their perimeter defense—Gonzaga's strength. Matchup dynamics favor Gonzaga's home-court edge in Spokane, where they boast a 15-1 record this season, alongside superior rebounding margins historically against Big 12 opponents. Texas' momentum lag and rest disadvantage after midweek travel tilt odds further toward the Bulldogs' steady form.

question: Jalen Duren: Points O/U 23.5
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 20 at 7:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Jalen Duren scores more than 23.5 points during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if Jalen Duren scores 23.5 points or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

events.title: Warriors vs. Pistons
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 20 at 7:30PM ET:
If the Warriors win, the market will resolve to "Warriors".
If the Pistons win, the market will resolve to "Pistons".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

eventMetadata.context_description: Detroit Pistons' 75.5% implied probability reflects trader consensus on Golden State Warriors' depleted roster amid a brutal injury wave, with Stephen Curry sidelined by a deep thigh bruise, Jonathan Kuminga out with thigh soreness, and Buddy Hield questionable with an ankle tweak per official reports. Pistons ride a hot streak, winners of four straight behind Cade Cunningham's explosive 29.5 points per game average and top-10 defense clamping opponents to 98 points nightly. Warriors limp in at 1-4 road form, outscored by 12 per 100 possessions without Curry, while Detroit's athletic frontcourt exploits Golden State's thin wing depth in this key Eastern Conference tilt. Upsets remain possible given NBA volatility.

question: Valorant: Gods Reign vs S8UL Esports (BO3) - VCL South Asia: Group Stage
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between Gods Reign and S8UL Esports in the VCL South Asia: Group Stage, initially scheduled for March 21 at 5:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Gods Reign" if Gods Reign win the match against S8UL Esports.

This market will resolve to "S8UL Esports" if S8UL Esports win the match against Gods Reign.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://vlr.gg. However, if https://vlr.gg has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.
